grade_criteria.A: Rich JSON schema (≥5 keys including nested arrays), substantive examples (not '无'), specific 使用场景 + 最佳实践 + 示例输入
grade_criteria.A-: A-level but example field is 'no' or weak
grade_criteria.B+: Decent schema (4-5 keys), 示例输入 = '无' but content rich elsewhere
grade_criteria.B: Mid schema (3-4 keys), thin or generic 使用场景
